query:
INSERT INTO kms_crs_activation_events (
            chain_id,
            block_hash,
            block_number,
            transaction_hash,
            crs_id,
            crs_digest,
            storage_urls
        )
        VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7)
        ON CONFLICT (chain_id, block_hash, crs_id)
        DO NOTHING
